ab: lawkah ta’ kahabaag! ralu’ mu ga Buyung.
en: Hello everyone, my name is Buyung.

ab: Buyung, lawkah su’!
lawkah ta’ kahabaag! ralu’ mu ga Takun.
en: Hello everyone, my name is Takun.

ab: Takun , lawkah su’!
lawkah su’! ikuwing ga Buyung.
Buyung lawkah su’! ikuwing ga Ingaw.
lawkah su’! ikuwing ga Takun.
Takun lawkah su’! ikuwing ga Ingaw.
ima’ su’?
ikuwing ga yaya’ ni Iban, ikuwing ga Tawyu’.
ima’ su’?
ikuwing ga suwayi’ na kanayril ni Iban, ralu’ mu ga Ali’.
ch: B:我是Kaynu’的妹妹，我的名字是Ali’。
en: I am Kaynu’s sister. My name is Ali’.

ab: ima’ i hiya’?
hiya’ ga sinsi’ mu, ralu’ niya’ ga Hayung.
ima’ ku itaal ka haca?
hiya’ ga qumisuwan mu na mamaliku, ralu’ niya’ ga Qumaw.
hiya’ ga Buyung qu?
uwal, hiya’ ga Buyung.
isu’ ga Buyung qu?
iqaat, ikuwing ga Ingaw.
ima’ ku Buyung?
ikuwing ku Buyung.
ima’ ku Ingaw?
Ingaw ga rawin mu.
nanuwan ku ralu’ ni qumisuwan na kanayril su’?
en: What is your elder sister’s name?

ab: ralu’ ni qumisuwan na kanayril mu ga Amuy.
en: My elder sister’s name is Amuy.

ab: nanuwan ku ralu’ ni suwayi’ na kanayril su’?
en: What is your younger sister’s name?

ab: ralu’ ni suwayi’ na kanayril mu ga Tapas.
en: My younger sister’s name is Tapas.

ab: baqun su’ ku ralu’ niya’ qu?
ralu’ niya’ ga Buyung.
piya’ kaal ni qumisuwan na mamaliku su’ kaal ka hani la?
en: How old is your elder brother?

ab: magalpu cu imagal kaal niya’ ka hani la.
piya’ kaal ni suwayi’ na mamaliku su’ kaal ka hani la?
en: How old is your younger brother?

ab: imagal kaal niya’ ka hani la.
kiya papatasan i tinqalangan mamu qu?
en: Do you have schools in your community?

ab: kiya.
kiya su’ matas i papatasan na tinqalangan qu?
ch: A:你在部落的學校讀書嗎?
en: Do you study in your tribe’s school?

ab: uwal ga, asi cami ga qutux cu imu i matas papatasan.
ch: B:是的，在學校讀書我們像一家人。
en: Yes, we are like family while we are studying at school.
